subcodes.first_line: A remembrance from Our presence unto them that have attained unto the splendours of the Bayán when the All-Merciful appeared with mighty sovereignty. Say: Verily, He summoneth you unto the horizon [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: ذکر من لدنا لمن فاز بأنوار البیان اذ اتی الرحمن بسلطان عظیم قل انه یدعوکم الی الأفق
